UV Flat Bed Printing

Print vivid, full colour graphics directly on wood, glass, metal, acrylic, leather & more with photo realistic precision and lasting UV cured ink.

CNC Engraving

We craft things that people remember.

Satara, Maharashtra

We craft things that
people remember.

Siya Creation is a UV flat bed printing and CNC engraving studio based in Satara. Since 2022, we have delivered thousands of personalised products for schools, businesses, government institutions and individuals who want quality that speaks for itself.

We use advanced UV flat bed printing technology that prints directly on almost any surface and our CNC and laser machines handle everything from fine jewellery engraving to full furniture panels and architectural doors.

250+
Projects Done
50+
Corporate Clients
2022
Year Started
5+
Technologies
01 / 04

Print on any surface, any material.

Metal, glass, acrylic, wood, tiles, coins, mobile covers. We print directly on virtually anything. The result is sharp, permanent and exactly what you imagined.

02 / 04

Carved with precision and purpose.

From 3D Ashoka pillar replicas to furniture panels, doors and jewellery. Our CNC machines turn raw material into lasting art. Every cut is calculated to the millimetre.

03 / 04

Laser work that lasts forever.

Complex shapes cut cleanly from acrylic, wood and MDF. Permanent fiber marking on metal and steel for serial numbers, logos and branding that never fades.

04 / 04

Gifts that are genuinely remembered.

From bulk trophies for Sainik School to personalised certificates and mementos for district events. We produce work that carries weight, meaning and pride.

What We Offer

Our Services

UV Custom Printing

  • UV Flat Bed Printing on metal, glass, acrylic, wood, tiles and coins
  • Mobile covers, pens, bottles and footwear
  • Packaging and online seller products
  • Sports goods and corporate stationery

Awards and Corporate Gifts

  • Custom trophies and mementos to requirement
  • Bulk orders for schools, colleges and institutions
  • Corporate gift packages and leather goods
  • Government and event awards

CNC Engraving and 3D Carving

  • Fine engraving on acrylic, wood and metal
  • 3D pillar carving and architectural panels
  • Jewellery personalization and name boards
  • LED backlit CNC cut boards

Laser Cutting and Fiber Marking

  • Laser cutting on acrylic, wood and MDF sheets
  • Laser fiber marking on metals and steel
  • Serial number, logo and branding marking
  • Interior decor, furniture, doors and almirahs
